scripts.prebuild: npm run sync:brand && mkdir -p app/public/locales app/public/js app/public/icons app/public/js/services app/public/js/parsers app/public/js/components app/public/js/utils app/public/js/pages app/public/js/vendor app/public/css && cp app/locales/*.json app/public/locales/ && cp app/js/i18n.js app/js/monefyi-ui.js app/js/app.js app/js/config.js app/public/js/ && cp -r app/js/services app/js/parsers app/js/components app/js/utils app/js/pages app/js/vendor app/public/js/ && cp app/css/*.css app/public/css/ && cp app/sw.js app/public/sw.js
scripts.sync:brand: cp shared/brand-tokens.css app/css/brand-tokens.css && cp shared/brand-tokens.css "landing page/css/brand-tokens.css"
scripts.build: npm run build:landing && npm run build:app
